title: Gemini visual review S12a panel a1

payload.notes: Gemini auto-gemini-3 VISUAL review of S12a_panel_a01.png, mode=baked. 双人身份在像素chibi风格下保持稳定：蓝衣 executor（棕发无须，欢呼被半空截停）与绿衣 reviewer（黑发有须，抓兜帽+压放大镜）区分清晰，与 duo_canonical_ref 一致，identity_consistency=5。像素霓虹风格统一、深夜审计室冷色调中一盏暖台灯的对比贴合 dark-cyber 基调，style_consistency=5。构图可读、视线导向清晰（被截停的双人 → 放大镜/evaluator → 发光审计门 → 被扣住的 +6.2），composition_readability=5。无肢体崩坏/融合/边缘粒子伪影，artifact_severity=0（0=无伪影）。本稿为 baked-duo：面板内 baked 英文技术字面清晰可读、拼写正确，baked_text_quality=5；观察到的字面文本 observed_literals=["EVAL PIPELINE", "AUDIT GATE", "T-05:12", "+6.2", "def exact_parse(json_str, schema):", "json.loads", "schema mismatch", "better masks"]，覆盖全部 expected_literals（AUDIT/+6.2/EVAL PIPELINE），与 B08 audit-gate 语境一致，content_corruption_present=false。[transcribed from gemini auto-gemini-3 CLI read, RC=0]
